stemHtml: The primary input signals for a hydro-mechanical gas turbine engine fuel control system include…

options.a: N2, turbine inlet temperature, fuel shut-off, generator, thrust lever angle.
options.b: N2, compressor discharge pressure, compressor inlet temperature, fuel shut-off, thrust lever angle.
options.c: N2, bypass ratio, EPR, fuel shut-off, thrust lever angle.
options.d: N1, N2, bypass ratio, fuel shut-off, thrust lever angle.
